title: Item In Your Helmet
description: Did You Ever Wanted A Vanilla Way To Change Your Helmet, You Can Wear Any Item With This Datapack
body:
# Item In Your Helmet
## - Features
**1.Replace Any Item In Your Main Hand**

**2.Completely Vanilla**

**3.Performance Friendly**

## - Explaining

 1. You Can Put Anything In Your Helmet, Hold An Item |**REQUIRED**| And Do /trigger wear. 
1.5. **~~CAUTION~~** Do **NOT** Put Anything In Your Helmet Slot becuase It Will Get **DELETED**.

2. No Mods Needed To Run This Datapack, Simply Install It in Your World And You Are Done.

3. No High Lag Spikes, Atleast Not From The Datapack,If You Want Any Performance Boost Check Out [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium).

## - Seggestions
**If You Want Me To Add Anything** Consider Checking Out My Discord Server [Here.](https://discord.gg/vmJJnGHtCP)

## Detailed With Images


Here I am Wearing An Amethyst Block In Front Of My Face
<details>
<summary>Amethyst</summary>

  ![Me in amethyst block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TG8dd01I/images/d841e74ccfaf83194718daa394f889a9b739b3e2.png)

</details>

Here Im Wearing A spawner, it looks like im caged


<details>
<summary>Spawner</summary>

  ![me in spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TG8dd01I/images/bc7d0dcb4ddccf3f6668ac7edda2724e74785989_350.webp)


</details>

here im wearing copper airpod, also btw you cant get 2 airpods only one.


<details>
<summary>Airpod</summary>

![Airpod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TG8dd01I/images/9eeb3d05d1e6651acd76a617d28cd3f194b74541_350.webp)

</details>

That's It Basically, dont forget to check out [**My channel**](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCsiPEepy5dzC4o3nxCDiQ-w) Thank You For Downloading And Bye.
